name: Sora 2
description_en: OpenAI's next-generation video and audio generation system with stronger physical accuracy, synchronized sound, and improved controllability.
description_zh: OpenAI 新一代视频与音频生成系统，强调更强的物理一致性、同步声音和可控性。
editorial_summary_zh: 把视频世界模型从研究展示进一步推向产品化和更强物理模拟表达。
editorial_summary_en: Shows video world models moving closer to product deployment with stronger simulation fidelity.
